'''Rilla''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and became a resistance fighter and member of [[The Eleven]] during the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] which was established by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. She was present in the [[Jedi asteroid]] when [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] arrived to search for [[Ferus Olin]]. Rilla was pleased and agreed to help him in searching for the missing Jedi. She remained in the asteroid until [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and the Imperials were able to find the secret base and Rilla was perished in the destruction.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission]]'' {{1st}}
